title: Authorize deterministic creation of the main ruleset

claims.statement: The accepted main-branch run for commit 7cdfe0d has an exact GitHub provenance attestation and a current ready observation.
The attested observation for commit 7cdfe0d recorded an empty ruleset snapshot and seven explicit activation blockers for refs/heads/main.
The OverlayKit organization currently has one human maintainer, so requiring an independent approval would prevent that maintainer from merging their own governed changes.
A create-only controller authorized by an attested GovernanceRun can activate the compiled ruleset without allowing conversational intent or mutable remote state to redefine the payload.
The human operator applying the accepted plan has repository Administration write permission through the authenticated gh CLI.
Whether GitHub will normalize optional ruleset parameters beyond the values submitted by the controller.

successCriteria.statement: The ruleset create payload is derived deterministically from the compiled GitHub trust anchor and is bound to the current plan and manifest hashes.
successCriteria.verification: Unit test compiles the same contract twice and compares canonical payloads and hashes.

successCriteria.statement: Remote mutation is refused unless an attested protected-main GovernanceRun is current, ready, and matches local HEAD and the live GitHub main ref.
successCriteria.verification: Automated adversarial tests plus guarded CLI preconditions.

successCriteria.statement: The controller never updates, adopts, or deletes an existing ruleset and refuses unexpected rulesets that already apply to main.
The created ruleset requires pull requests, GitHub Actions validate, verified signatures, resolved conversations, and blocks deletion and force pushes without bypass actors.
successCriteria.verification: Payload test and post-create GitHub observation with activationReady=true.

successCriteria.statement: Only merge commits are allowed while independent approvals remain at zero until a second trusted human is available.
successCriteria.verification: Ruleset payload and observer drift tests.

definitionOfDone.statement: CHG-0003, profile 1.2.0, mechanisms, plan, and manifest compile deterministically without mutating accepted records.
The create-only controller and observer reject wrong hashes, wrong refs, unsafe merge methods, bypasses, and unexpected applicable rulesets.
The complete workspace quality and build suites pass.
definitionOfDone.evidence: npm run check && npm run build

definitionOfDone.statement: The activation PR passes validate and observe with GitHub-verified commit signatures.
After merge, the controller emits a receipt and a current post-create observation with activationReady=true before any gate is promoted.
definitionOfDone.evidence: github-ruleset activation receipt and GitHub observation artifacts
